headline: Regions Financial Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher NII & Fee Income
summary: RF tops Q1 earnings estimates on higher NII and fee income, as loan growth and improving credit quality offset rising expenses.

raw.headline: Regions Financial Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher NII & Fee Income
raw.summary: RF tops Q1 earnings estimates on higher NII and fee income, as loan growth and improving credit quality offset rising expenses.

headline: Retaining Deposit Market Share Is Challenging In Big Bank Deals
summary: Large bank buyers returned to M&A market, but a review of some previous big-ticket deals shows how difficult it is to maintain the pro forma deposit market share totals. Read more here.
